Off Calendar Nov-13-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And To Enter Stipulation And [Proposed] Order Re: Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement is granted. Prevailing party to submit a proposed order after hearing, and a separate proposed judgment to the Court for signature. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Linda S. Forster, CSR #13286. (302/EHG)
